units.note: All dimensions/positions in fen. Scene scale: 1 fen = 16.5 mm.

components.role: Raised earthen-core masonry platform carrying the entire timber frame.
components.source: No published dimension in corpus — sized for visual context only

components.role: U-shaped low altar holding the 14 extant Tang statues; the column-free interior exists to serve it (右绕礼佛 circumambulation ring).
Stone plinth isolating the column foot from ground moisture.
components.source: YZFS 卷三 造柱础之制 「方倍柱之径」

components.role: Corner column with 生起 rise of +2 fen — gentler than the YZFS rule, a documented deviation.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS 卷五: 「至角则随间数生起，三间生高二寸」(would be 60mm)
components.note: Three square columns differ markedly from the round columns — likely NOT original 782 members (different period). Render with conjecture flag; their diameter/height inferences are unreliable.

components.role: Perimeter eave column; the hall has no interior columns, freeing the floor for the altar.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS 用柱之制 (余屋 range)

components.role: Tie beam linking the column tops into a ring; Nanchan has no pupai-fang above it — an early-period trait.
components.source: YZFS 卷五 (member present in building; section unrecorded in corpus)

components.role: Capital block collecting the whole bracket set's load into the column.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS: 栌斗 32×32 fen, height 20 fen (耳8平4欹8)
components.note: Smaller than Fashi spec in all dimensions — documented deviation.

components.name_zh: 角华栱（第一跳，足材加宽）
components.role: Load-bearing projecting arm widened to 11 fen — the builders bent the modular system for mechanics, centuries before Ming/Qing practice.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS: 「每跳之长，心不过三十分°」 — jump 1 complies
components.note: Corner set simplified: diagonal arm only (v1); full 转角铺作 composition deferred.

components.role: Projecting arm stepping the eave load outward; 偷心造 — no transverse arm rides this jump.
components.note: Corner set simplified: diagonal arm only (v1); full 转角铺作 composition deferred.

components.role: Transverse arm in the wall plane carrying the 柱头枋 tiers.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS spec: 62 / 72 / 92 fen
components.note: 70 fen — equals the ling gong, breaking the usual early pattern (YZFS: 62).
